metadata.instruction: Set an alarm for 8.30 AM that repeats every Monday
metadata.context: I need an alarm to remind me to badge in to work.

l3.rationale: Moved cursor over the Search button.

l3.rationale: Clicked Add an alarm to create a new alarm entry.

l3.rationale: Clicked Save to store the alarm.

l4.rationale: Clicked Save to finalize and store the alarm configuration.

l5.rationale: The final confirmation saves the alarm, then the window switch exits back out after completion.
